reviews.review_description: It seems like a small thing, but based in the video I assumed you could take multiple views in the battle. Nope. You can only slide view up down left right. No rotation, no viewing from fleet's perspective. Gonna go ahead and call bullshots in this one. Too bad, since gameplay was passable.
This game has a great look and feel to it. mapping out a holographic space battle in a 3d playing field is incredible. great work, i cannot wait to try your other games! highly reccommend!

Wanted to give four stars because I'd like some more content/options like new backgrounds or colours but seriously couldn't justify it, the games amazing, although I guess at this price point it would be fair to expect some of what I mentioned

I LOVED Dark Net, and I REALLY wanted to like this title, but it just doesn't do it for me.  I suppose it is a matter of taste, but this just isn't my bag.  Choose your ships, choose who to attack, wait to BE attacked, and repeat. I am a fan of relaxed Game play, but not this, sorry.
This game is the reason why you should buy a VR device. Wow. So totally addicting.  Good job developers!! Please bring us others AAA titles. Please, take my money!

Nice graphics and gameplay. Wish there was a Quest version!

Update: Please update the game for Quest 2. Please. 

I Willis happily pay for an updated version.
I paid for it however it won't download. Refund request.

This is one of the four games bu Ed McNeil.  The other three Darknet, Astreus and Tactera

This one is fun and graphics are really cool.  There is a way to win pretty easily if you check YOUTUBE review.  But still a cool game.  

You are up against a FLEET and must go into SPACE BATTLE to win

For me, the coolest thing is to see the ships in 3D flying around.  

Well done game.

Can't wait to try the other 3 McNeil games

I bought this game not knowing what to expect, and quickly fell in love! I was sort of dissapointed I couldn’t rotate my view, but commanding the fleet is fun all the same! I feel a bit like Ender Wiggin at the command of the fleet, and that’s super fun!

Skylight's hybrid turn-based/real-time system works well and the interface makes it easy to issue orders in 3D. The campaign mode is somewhat challenging allowing you to develop different formulae for defeating different ships, but once you do it gets a bit samey. I found the multiplayer never worked though, a suspicious 'human' opponent was instantly found, but never took their turn - ever time!

Will this game be available for the quest? It looks like a really great game but it seems I can’t play it on my quest, Hope a quest version of it comes out soon, looking forward to playing this game as I enjoy Tactera!
